name: Basic Missouri Mix Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Water or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the mix before measuring out the ingredients.
2. Gradually add water, a little at a time, until a soft dough forms.
3. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface.
4. Knead the dough ten times.
5. Roll or pat the dough to a thickness of about 1/2 inch.
6. Cut out biscuits using a floured biscuit cutter.
7. Place the biscuits on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake in an oven set to 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until they are lightly browned.
